generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String
  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
  sessionId          String             @unique
  turnId             String?
  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
  summary                   CheckpointSummary?

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {
  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String
  sessionId    String

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSummary {
  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId         String            @unique
  intent            String
  outcome           String
  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
}

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
  sessionId       String
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model SessionLink {
  id          Int     @id @default(autoincrement())
  metadata    String?
  transcript  String?
  context     String?
  contentHash String?
  prompt      String?
}

model FilePath {
  id   Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  path String @unique
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                   Int  @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens          Int  @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens  Int  @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens      Int  @default(0)
  outputTokens         Int  @default(0)
  apiCallCount         Int  @default(0)
}

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'

  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {

  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint

  @@index([sessionId])
}

  parentUuid      String?

  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation(fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation(fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id   Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  path String @unique
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                  Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens         Int @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens Int @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens     Int @default(0)
  outputTokens        Int @default(0)
  apiCallCount        Int @default(0)
}

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String
  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
  sessionId          String             @unique
  turnId             String?
  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
  summary                   CheckpointSummary?

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {
  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String
  sessionId    String

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSummary {
  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId         String            @unique
  intent            String
  outcome           String
  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
}

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
  sessionId       String
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

  id                  Int                                   @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion          String?
  checkpointId        String
  sessionId           String                                @unique
  strategy            String?
  createdAt           DateTime?
  branch              String?
  checkpointsCount    Int                                   @default(0)
  agent               String?
  turnId              String?

  tokenUsage          TokenUsage?                           @relation(fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])

  initialAttribution  InitialAttribution?
  summary             CheckpointSessionSummary?
  openItems           OpenItem[]
  frictionItems       FrictionItem[]
  repoLearnings       RepoLearning[]
  codeLearnings       CodeLearning[]
  workflowLearnings   WorkflowLearning[]
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointSessionMetadataId Int
  filePathId                  Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata   CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath                    FilePath                  @relation(fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model InitialAttribution {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  calculatedAt                  DateTime?
  agentLines                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanAdded                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanModified                 Int                       @default(0)
  humanRemoved                  Int                       @default(0)
  totalCommitted                Int                       @default(0)
  agentPercentage               Float                     @default(0)
}

model CheckpointSessionSummary {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  intent                        String
  outcome                       String
}

model OpenItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model FrictionItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model RepoLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model CodeLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  path                          String
  finding                       String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model WorkflowLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation(fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation(fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id   Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  path String @unique
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                  Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens         Int @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens Int @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens     Int @default(0)
  outputTokens        Int @default(0)
  apiCallCount        Int @default(0)
}

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String
  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
  sessionId          String             @unique
  turnId             String?
  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
  summary                   CheckpointSummary?

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {
  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String
  sessionId    String

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSummary {
  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId         String            @unique
  intent            String
  outcome           String
  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
}

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
  sessionId       String
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

Done. Here's the full structure added:

| Table | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `CheckpointSessionMetadata` | main | scalar fields + all FK/list relations |
| `CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath` | join table | `(checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId)` composite PK, reuses `FilePath` |
| `InitialAttribution` | one-to-one | `calculatedAt`, `agentLines`, `humanAdded/Modified/Removed`, `totalCommitted`, `agentPercentage` |
| `CheckpointSessionSummary` | one-to-one | `intent`, `outcome` |
| `OpenItem` | one-to-many | `text` |
| `FrictionItem` | one-to-many | `text` |
| `RepoLearning` | one-to-many | `text` |
| `CodeLearning` | one-to-many | `path`, `finding` |
| `WorkflowLearning` | one-to-many | `text` |

`tokenUsage` links to the existing `TokenUsage` table via `tokenUsageId`. All one-to-many tables are indexed on their FK column.
